name: aviebelle-photo-booth
description: A premium black-and-white Electron photo booth kiosk for modern events.

scripts.dev: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && concurrently -k "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json
